footer.description: Your money under control, your way.
callToAction.startNow: Start today to have total control over your
landing.about.description: My Exchange is the perfect app for anyone who wants to keep their finances organized in a simple and efficient way. With an intuitive interface and essential features, you can track your expenses, view your monthly accounts and keep everything under control with total security.
features.description_1: Record and monitor all your financial transactions
features.description_2: Add income and expenses in seconds
features.description_4: Access from any device with ease
features.title: Features
login.card_description: Fill in your Email and Password to continue
login.hero_description: We are ready to help you keep your finances on track today. Shall we?
signIn.cardDescription: Enter your details to create your account
signIn.hero_description: Organize your earnings, control your spending and achieve your goals with the simplicity you've always wanted.
signIn.title: New User
legal.terms_content: By using Meu Troco, you agree to keep your information up to date and secure. Our service is intended for personal finance management and should not be used for illegal purposes. We reserve the right to update these terms periodically to better serve the needs of the platform and our users.
legal.privacy_content: Your privacy is our priority. We only collect the data necessary for the app to function, such as email and financial information that you choose to register. We do not sell your data to third parties. You have total control over your information and can request the deletion of your account and data at any time through support.

hero.description: Transform your relationship with money using cutting-edge technology. Intuitive visualizations, bank-level security, and powerful insights.

connect.title: Add anything,
connect.subtitle: see anything.
connect.description: Links to banks, digital wallets, and brokers. Everything in one place, synced in real time.

budgeting.title: Budgeting,
budgeting.subtitle: made simple.
budgeting.description: Create personalized budgets for each category and track your progress with smart alerts before you exceed limits.

security.title: Uncompromising Security.
security.subtitle: Radical Transparency.
security.f1_desc: Your financial data is encrypted with AES-256 before it leaves your device.
security.f2_desc: Our business model is based on subscription, not selling your privacy.
security.f3_desc: We give full transparency on how we process your data and connections.
security.f4_desc: Our platform evolves every day with new features and performance improvements based on your feedback.
security.f5_desc: We have an open channel to hear from you. Your suggestions shape the future of Meu Troco.

ai.title: And yes, it's AI.
ai.description: Analyze spending patterns, predict future cash flows, and receive smart recommendations to save more, automatically.

login.quotes.q1: The best tool to manage daily savings smartly.
login.quotes.q2: Small savings today, big achievements tomorrow. Start now.
login.quotes.q3: Organize your financial future with simplicity and security.
